creator: ariff@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 6 Mar 2007 16:20:14 GMT
Marcin <hybridx87@gmail.com> wrote:

>  
>  vchan i had enabled:
>  
>  cat /etc/sysctl.conf;
>  
>  hw.snd.pcm0.vchans=4
>  hw.snd.maxautovchans=4
>  

What matters is the output of "sysctl hw.snd". Double check on that,
and please enable it (make it "4" or more).



--
Ariff Abdullah
FreeBSD

... Recording in stereo is obviously too advanced
    and confusing for us idiot ***** users :P ........
